title: 'elohiym #0430
definition:
1) (plural)
    1a) rulers, judges
    1b) divine ones
    1c) angels
    1d) gods
 2) (plural intensive - singular meaning)
    2a) god, goddess
    2b) godlike one
    2c) works or special possessions of God
    2d) the (true) God
    2e) God
nasbUsage:

    1a) rulers, judges

    1d) gods
 2) (plural intensive - singular meaning)
    2a) god, goddess

    2d) the (true) God
    2e) God

    NASB:  God, god
